name: Fallen Angel of the Golden Land
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>金</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>郷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のアンヘルカイド
name_jp_tl: Ángel Caído of the Golden Land
desc:
"Eldlich the Golden Lord" + 1 Zombie monster
Must be either Fusion Summoned, or Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by Tributing 1 LIGHT Zombie monster, while you have "Eldlich the Golden Lord" in your field or GY. You can only Special Summon "Fallen Angel of the Golden Land" once per turn this way, no matter which method you use. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 "Eldlich" monster from your Deck, Extra Deck, or GY. You can only use this effect of "Fallen Angel of the Golden Land" once per turn.

mentions: Fallen Angel of the Golden Land
action: Tributes Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion
Activates if sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
Can be Special Summoned either by Fusion Summon or Contact Fusion
Contact Fusion without listed Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
